x4freetext: A polarized proton beam was produced by scattering
50-MeV protons from a 10-MeV thick calcium target.
NaI(Tl) crystals mounted on selected RCA 6199
Energy spread in the range 300 to 500 keV.
The over-all resolution was 500 to 800 keV.
Uncertainty in determining the target thickness
